name: google-calendar-event-creator
description: Chrome extension that creates a pre-filled Google Calendar event from the event details on the current web page.

_scriptNotes.--disable-warning=MODULE_TYPELESS_PACKAG: Deliberate, reviewed suppression (issue #305). The popup's ES-module graph (extension/config.js, extension/fallback-policy.js, extension/events-popup/build-calendar-url.js, extension/events-popup/popup.js, extension/events-popup/*.js) is loaded as .js with no package.json "type" (the rest of the repo is CommonJS), so Node parses-as-CJS-then-reparses-as-ESM and warns on every test run. This is a Node-loader-only artifact: the shipped extension loads these via <script type="module"> in extension/events-popup/popup.html and Chrome never reads package.json, so nothing is wrong in production. Suppressing only this one code keeps other warnings visible (see the warnings rule in dev/procedures/workflow.md). Applied only to the node invocations that import the ESM graph.

_dependencyNotes.jsdom: Test-only. Provides a DOM implementation (extension-test/harness.js) so the unmodified extractor scripts (extension/event-extractors/) can be run and asserted against in Node, exactly as they execute in a browser. Not shipped with the extension.
_dependencyNotes.satori: Test-only. Renders the popup's HTML/CSS-subset tree to SVG for UI snapshot tests (dev/requirements/shared/render/popup-renderer.js), since it isn't a real screenshot of the popup.
_dependencyNotes.@resvg/resvg-js: Test-only. Rasterizes the SVG produced by satori into a PNG for UI snapshot tests (dev/requirements/shared/render/popup-renderer.js).
_dependencyNotes.pngjs: Test-only. Decodes/encodes the PNG snapshots compared in the UI tests (dev/requirements/shared/render/visual-snapshots.test.js).
_dependencyNotes.pixelmatch: Test-only. Performs pixel-level diffing between rendered and reference PNGs in the UI tests (dev/requirements/shared/render/visual-snapshots.test.js).
